programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Attempts to scare off Robert's other mother leave him little to crow about

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: A housing shortage forces a compromise between the flatmates and their disapproving landlord. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When a man's charred remains are found after an explosion, Foyle's investigations lead him to a top secret intelligence organisation. With murder and deception rife among its members, the race is on to find out the truth, but the detective's discoveries threaten his future career. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen with guests Angela Thorne, Ronald Pickup and Samuel West

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A flamboyant photographer and his models descend on the village, while Nick is called on to sort out a dispute at a hotel _ and finds himself looking down the barrel of a gun. Drama, starring Nick Berry and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Angie investigates Chris's disappearance. Kathy has a go at Elsa in front of Alice. Butch tries to lift Emily's spirits. Scott tries to apologise to Lyn

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy is hopeful that Elsa will leave her alone. Lisa tries to persuade John to come to the wedding. Zoe confides in Paddy how worried she is about Chris

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly agrees to be Spider's campaign manager. Michael encourages Jim to claim disability benefits. Hayley tells Roy about her unhappy childhoo

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Roy goes on a health kick and starts jogging. Spider and his policies go down a storm with the students. Jim asks Liz to let him fend for himself more often

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Lady Virginia Revel receives a marriage proposal from an ambitious politician, but is reluctant to accept it, especially as she is also being courted by a dashing young suitor. Accompanied by Miss Marple, she travels to a weekend party at her family home Chimneys, hoping to reach a decision. Negotiations for the sale of the country house are taking place during the gathering, but when new owner Count Ludwig of Austria is found murdered, St Mary Mead's elderly spinster must identify the culprit. Whodunit, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast including Gavin & Stacey stars Ruth Jones and Mathew Horne, plus Dervla Kirwan, Charlotte Salt, Michelle Collins, Jonas Armstrong and Edward Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An archaeologist's wife is murdered during an excavation in the Middle East. Fortunately, a vacationing Poirot - who shares with most great detectives an inability to go on holiday without stumbling over a body or two - is on hand to investigate. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Ron Berglas, Georgina Sowerby and Iain Mitchell

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A fisherman's body is found tangled up in a North Sea trawler's net. Vera and her team investigate with the help of the local harbourmaster, and find the dead man's sons pointing the finger at the owner of a fish market, with whom they have a long-running feud. Retracing the dead man's steps, Vera discovers when he drowned and tracks down a waitress who may have been one of the last people to see him alive. However, the case becomes more complicated when a witness runs away and a boat belonging to the dead man's sister-in-law goes up in flames

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a business magnate, his wife and their maid are murdered, Miss Marple (Julia McKenzie) is prompted by the circumstances surrounding the incidents to recall the nursery rhyme Sing a Song of Sixpence. She discovers the victims were part of a family tainted by secrets, and as she ponders the significance of the tune, a past scandal reveals itself. Murder mystery, featuring Wendy Richard as feisty cook Mrs Crump, in her final dramatic role. Other guest stars include Prunella Scales, Matthew Macfadyen, Ralf Little, Rupert Graves and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Attempts to scare off Robert's other mother leave him little to crow about

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida's birthday celebrations give her the blues, and even Wilfred's arrival doesn't make her any happier

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo try to foil a showdown at the Mucky Duck Saloon when Robin and loud Irishman Mick get into an argument. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An old pal of Greengrass's turns up with a money-making scheme, but the pair are soon out of their depth and Nick is forced to go undercover to sort it out. Meanwhile, Ventress tries to organise a marquee for his daughter's wedding - with disappointing results. Police drama, starring Nick Berry

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Angie warns Sean to expect a visit from CID about Chris's disappearance. Zoe is convinced Chris is dead. Elsa has some devastating news for Kathy

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy and Laura discuss the impending custody case. Bernice's devotion to Feng Shui angers Alan. Zoe tells Laura she is going to buy Home Farm

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita worries about what is happening to her health. The Websters return from America. Spider is angry when Fred and Alec attempt to bribe him

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. While holidaying at the plush Bertram's Hotel in London, Miss Marple is presented with a fresh challenge to her deductive powers when the reading of a will leads to a double murder. Geraldine McEwan stars as the elderly spinster with a nose for a mystery, with guest appearances by Peter Davison, Mica Paris and Francesca Annis

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates when the body of a wildlife ranger is found on a remote island off the coast of Northumberland. Her death is at first assumed to be an accident, since she was alone on the island when she died, but marks on the body seem to point to murder. As Vera delves into the dead woman's personal life, she uncovers dark secrets and old resentments

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Ever since a beautiful American woman arrived in the peaceful village of Wychwood-under-Ashe, people have begun to die in a series of apparent accidents. Nobody suspects a killer is at work but, as the body count rises, Miss Marple digs a little deeper with the help of a former policeman - and they gradually unearth a secret that will rock the village to its core. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, Benedict Cumberbatch, David Haig, Sylvia Syms, Margo Stilley and Hugo Speer

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida's birthday celebrations give her the blues, and even Wilfred's arrival doesn't make her any happier

programme.desc: A flamboyant photographer and his models descend on the village, while Nick is called on to sort out a dispute at a hotel _ and finds himself looking down the barrel of a gun. Drama, starring Nick Berry and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida's birthday celebrations give her the blues, and even Wilfred's arrival doesn't make her any happier

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo try to foil a showdown at the Mucky Duck Saloon when Robin and loud Irishman Mick get into an argument. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An old pal of Greengrass's turns up with a money-making scheme, but the pair are soon out of their depth and Nick is forced to go undercover to sort it out. Meanwhile, Ventress tries to organise a marquee for his daughter's wedding - with disappointing results. Police drama, starring Nick Berry

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Angie warns Sean to expect a visit from CID about Chris's disappearance. Zoe is convinced Chris is dead. Elsa has some devastating news for Kathy

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy and Laura discuss the impending custody case. Bernice's devotion to Feng Shui angers Alan. Zoe tells Laura she is going to buy Home Farm

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita worries about what is happening to her health. The Websters return from America. Spider is angry when Fred and Alec attempt to bribe him

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. While holidaying at the plush Bertram's Hotel in London, Miss Marple is presented with a fresh challenge to her deductive powers when the reading of a will leads to a double murder. Geraldine McEwan stars as the elderly spinster with a nose for a mystery, with guest appearances by Peter Davison, Mica Paris and Francesca Annis

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates when the body of a wildlife ranger is found on a remote island off the coast of Northumberland. Her death is at first assumed to be an accident, since she was alone on the island when she died, but marks on the body seem to point to murder. As Vera delves into the dead woman's personal life, she uncovers dark secrets and old resentments

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Ever since a beautiful American woman arrived in the peaceful village of Wychwood-under-Ashe, people have begun to die in a series of apparent accidents. Nobody suspects a killer is at work but, as the body count rises, Miss Marple digs a little deeper with the help of a former policeman - and they gradually unearth a secret that will rock the village to its core. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, Benedict Cumberbatch, David Haig, Sylvia Syms, Margo Stilley and Hugo Speer

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida's birthday celebrations give her the blues, and even Wilfred's arrival doesn't make her any happier

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian Outback in a bid to catch the rare and fearsome freshwater sawfish, which is reputed to reach 18ft long and attack boats. In his quest to discover more about the predator, he roams across an ancient landscape, encountering scientists and a real-life Crocodile Dundee, before finally confronting the disturbing truth

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The team investigates when a top Pentagon official is found dead in Wales. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of an aristocrat's butler, whose erudition seems strangely at odds with his lowly occupation, presents Holmes with a fresh mystery to solve. The key to the case lies in an ancient family ritual - and points the way to a historic treasure. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed is invited to a party on an aeroplane with a motley crew. However, as the pilotless craft takes off, a voice tells them they are bound for a desert island where one will be revealed as a killer. Donald Sutherland, Charlotte Rampling and Brian Blessed guest star

programme.title: French Open Tennis: Roland-Garros Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the fourth day of the second Grand Slam of the year, held at Roland Garros, where the men's and women's second-round matches are scheduled to get under way. There were comfortable straight-set victories for Rafael Nadal, Dominic Thiem and Simona Halep against Mackenzie McDonald, Jack Sock and Irina-Camelia Begu respectively at this stage last year. However, there was disappointment for three-time champion Serena Williams, as injury forced her to give a walkover to wild card Tsvetana Pironkova. John Inverdale presents, with analysis from Jim Courier, Fabrice Santoro, Marion Bartoli, Mark Petchey, Anne Keothavong and Sam Smith, commentary by Nick Mullins and Jonathan Overend, and reports from Celina Hinchcliffe

programme.title: Cycling: Criterium du Dauphine Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage four, which featured a 16.4km individual time-trial from Firminy to Roche-La-Moliere. Gary Imlach presents, with commentary by Simon Brotherton and David Millar, and reports from Daniel Friebe

programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley

programme.desc: Jeff and Meg make a bad impression on potential buyers when a car's engine fails just before it is due to be sold at auction

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Captain Jack Crocker, a robust seafaring man, is implicated in the murder of beautiful aristocrat Lady Brackenstall's abusive husband. Drama, guest starring Oliver Tobias, with Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke and Anne Louise Lambert

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Peel are on an express train to investigate the disappearance of an agent. However while travelling, the duo get embroiled in a plot on the life of the prime minister. Adventure, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at The Indoor League. A show featuring 1970s pub games, presented by Yorkshire cricketing great Fred Trueman.

programme.title: French Open Tennis: Roland-Garros Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the fifth day of the second Grand Slam of the year, which comes from Roland Garros, where the men's and women's second-round matches are scheduled to conclude. Second women's seed Karolina Pliskova's tournament came to an end at this stage last year when she lost 6-4, 6-2 to 2017 champion Jelena Ostapenko, and her twin sister Kristyna also lost to a former champion, when 2016 title-winner prevailed 6-3, 6-2. However, there were no such problems for top-ranked man Novak Djokovic, as he comfortably overcame Ricardas Berankis. John Inverdale presents, with analysis from Jim Courier, Fabrice Santoro, Marion Bartoli, Mark Petchey, Anne Keothavong and Sam Smith, commentary by Nick Mullins and Jonathan Overend, and reports from Celina Hinchcliffe

programme.title: Cycling: Criterium du Dauphine Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage five, which featured a 175.5km course from Saint-Chamond to Saint-Vallier. Gary Imlach presents, with commentary by Simon Brotherton and David Millar, and reports from Daniel Friebe

programme.desc: A wisecracking police negotiator meets his match in a ruthless jewel thief, who has not only murdered one of his best friends but has also taken a group of innocent victims hostage - including the cop's former girlfriend. programme.title: French Open Tennis: Roland-Garros Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day six of the second Grand Slam of the year, which comes from Roland Garros, where the men's and women's third-round matches are scheduled to get under way. Rafael Nadal continued his march to a 13th title here with a comfortable 6-1, 6-4, 6-0 win over Stefano Travaglia, after top women's seed Simona Halep had also been in dominant form as she swept aside Amanda Anisimova 6-0, 6-1. Elsewhere, there was a memorable victory for home wild card Hugo Gaston, as he overcame 2015 champion Stan Wawrinka in five sets. John Inverdale presents, with analysis from Jim Courier, Fabrice Santoro, Marion Bartoli, Mark Petchey, Anne Keothavong and Sam Smith, commentary by Nick Mullins and Jonathan Overend, and reports from Celina Hinchcliffe

programme.title: Cycling: Criterium du Dauphine Highlights

programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters with different requirements. In 2010, Carole and Alan, and their daughter Lauren, were casting a wide net over Somerset and Devon. They needed a rural spot to accommodate Lauren's dog training business, as well as a home with the potential to do holiday lets to keep Carole and Alan busy. And in 2019, Ros and Hannah wanted to buy their first home together, but finding somewhere that ticked all of their boxes proved. Now they programme returns to see how both couples are getting on

programme.desc: Hannah and her new partner, Billy Murdoch, start investigating the Mimica family, believing them to be responsible for Sean's murder. They discover that the clan are planning to smuggle a massive quantity of cocaine into the country. programme.desc: A 69-year-old man is rushed to St George's after collapsing on a tennis court, and the resus team has to work quickly to get his dangerously high heart rate under control. Other patients include a father suffering from shortness of breath and a young man who sustained a head injury playing football. Newly qualified consultant Mehrad recounts what it's like to work under pressure and the satisfaction of saving a patient's life

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five volunteers to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. Initial testing reveals all of them to likely be at risk from debilitating conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, heart disease, chronic inflammation and stress. Most have the aerobic fitness age of someone at least 20 years older. In the first episode, Michael investigates their digestive health and starts them out on a new training plan in conjunction with GP and fitness trainer Dr Folusha Oluwajana

programme.title: The Pyramid (2014)
programme.desc: A previously unexplored pyramid is discovered in the Egyptian desert, and a party of archaeologists sets out to uncover its secrets. Horror, starring Ashley Hinshaw and Denis O'Hare

programme.title: Market (2019)
programme.desc: A former drug user struggles to get his life back on course, while an elderly man fights the onset of dementia, and a housewife becomes the victim of domestic violence. In Khasi with English subtitles

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: The battle to save Thailand's wild tigers from poachers and smugglers, who have made millions from their sinister and sometimes deadly trade. Reporter Jonathan Miller travels to the last safe haven of the near-extinct Indochinese tiger and meets the rangers and conservationists fighting to protect the endangered tiger. Thai wildlife enforcement agencies are determined to crack down on the illegal trade in both live and dead tigers. However, they are struggling against a lucrative and murky industry that supplies an insatiable demand from Vietnam and China for trophies and quack medicine

programme.title: Frasier

programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up for a final showdown, as Kaye and Lily bring Harriet and Richard's blind issues to light before dishing the dirt on Sophie and David's discoveries. Amanda wants to know why frank feelings were unleased when it came to her canine companion, Trudy. David and Sophie banish Harriet and Richard's bathroom blues, before confronting Kaye and Lily with their cleanliness critique. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: In the city that never sleeps, the documentary discovers a homelessness epidemic in New York's shelter system, made worse by the Covid crisis. Reporter Krishnan Guru-Murthy witnesses the harsh reality of addiction, fear, violence and intimidation in a system meant to be helping the city's most vulnerable men, women and children. With one epidemic feeding another, there is now more homelessness in New York than at any time since the Great Depression, and it's disproportionately affecting black and brown people

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness

programme.title: M&S vs Waitrose: Which Is Better Value?
programme.desc: Documentary examining the ongoing rivalry between the supermarkets. Marks & Spencer has always had a special place in the nation's heart, with almost 1,000 stores and a reputation for quality stretching back 135 years. But Waitrose has proved a fierce rival. However, both stores face tough challenges in the future, not least from online retailers. Which of the two is best equipped to weather the high-street storm?

programme.title: Kew Gardens: A Year In Bloom
programme.desc: The year is drawing to a close as a glorious summer gives way to autumn and Kew Gardens embraces its new colour palette. On Cherry Walk, 6,000 tulip bulbs are being planted for spring flowering and Tony encourages the team before visiting the arboretum to investigate why some of his trees are showing signs of seasonal shock. In the kitchen garden, Helena is planting onions in the autumn in a bid to avoid an onion-munching bug. She shows off some potato substitutes and pumpkins, while also selling produce to raise seed money

programme.title: Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: Locked in the infamous Tower, Anne is accused of treason, adultery and, mystifyingly, incest. She is watched by her former ally Lady Shelton, who is secretly passing information to Cromwell. On the day of her trial, Anne presents herself with the pride and dignity of a warrior. Jodie Turner-Smith stars

programme.title: Meghan: Where Did It All Go Wrong?
programme.desc: A look at the life of Meghan Markle, tracing the early years of her childhood, through to her becoming a successful Hollywood actor, and her subsequent marriage to Prince Harry. Royal commentators including Andrew Morton, Eve Pollard and biographer Katie Nicholl offer their take on the recent impact on the Royal family, and there is a look at some of the recent stories that have featured in the British tabloids concerning Meghan

programme.title: Inside Tiffany's: The World's Most Famous Jewellers
programme.desc: A look at the iconic jewellery brand, founded in New York in 1837, which has harnessed the power of royalty and celebrity to appeal to fashionistas and lovers of beautiful jewellery design. Company insiders and industry experts reveal the story of how Tiffany and Co went from a small American trinket store to a multibillion-pound company - and an international icon of style, bold artistry and innovative design. Through fascinating archive and insightful interviews, this documentary celebrates the brand, which reached iconic status thanks to Audrey Hepburn's film Breakfast at Tiffany's

programme.title: Wissper
programme.desc: Honey Bear gets covered in twigs and leaves and Ed and Ted Beaver think she is a monster

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but he keeps getting the boat stuck in the mud. They all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Every Easter, the Sunny Bunnies go to the park to get their favourite chocolate bunnies. They're so appealing that the bunnies want to collect them all

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a sprout farmer who is planning to return to her roots in the seaside village of Rush. He soon finds she has ambitious plans for a rebuild on an old fisherman's house, including a large extension and a viewing turret, and struggles to reign in her stranger ideas - like a tunnel for cars running through the middle of the house

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Build a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke revisits hard-working grandparents Terry and Marilyn in the Northumbrian Dales as they begin the next phase of their epic project to restore an ancient farmhouse

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tane's true feelings come to light after a drunk Mac propositions him. Amber cannot deny her insecurities regarding Dean and Ziggy

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul plots to ruin Brent's chance of release by urging Holden to paint him as a criminal ring leader. Karl and Susan put Toadie in an awkward situation

programme.title: Stalked By My Ex (2017)
programme.desc: Chloe's abusive ex-husband has been in prison for years, but when she hears he is being released on probation, she takes their teenage daughter Olivia and flees to her small home town. Thriller, starring Tamara Braun and Yves Bright

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Return of the documentary following Brits who moved to Spain, swapping the UK for a new life in the sun. The first edition follows drag duo John and Barry, known as 'Dragtastic', who get to work repairing dozens of outfits, while also dealing with their respective day jobs of cooking and teaching. Elsewhere, pensioners Ray and Christine try to adapt to the high summer heat, while ARCH horse charity founder Jill races to the rescue of a neglected white stallion

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Paul plots to ruin Brent's chance of release by urging Holden to paint him as a criminal ring leader. Karl and Susan put Toadie in an awkward situation

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tane's true feelings come to light after a drunk Mac propositions him. Amber cannot deny her insecurities regarding Dean and Ziggy

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Inside the Balmoral: Scotland's Finest Hotel
programme.desc: It's now autumn and the hotel is in a bid to attract new guests. It goes hi-tech, with an indoor drone shoot for Visit Scotland. Resident hotel manager Rob gets Instagram-ready, welcoming social media celebrity Mildred - a kilt-sporting sausage dog with 60,000 followers

programme.title: Gregg Wallace's Big Weekend Away
programme.desc: The presenter has always wanted to visit the German capital, and over three days he digs into Berlin's fascinating history and food. Gregg Wallace gets stuck into some local classics - including currywurst, pretzels and steins of beer - but also discovers dishes distinct to this city that reveal an often overlooked part of Germany's food traditions

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Austria's stunning Transalpine railway, which crosses the snowy peaks of the Tirol. Our journey begins in the historic city of Graz and heads west through famous alpine beauty spots, including Zell am Zee, where the sounds of yodelling still echo across pristine mountain valleys. The final stretch passes through the 10.6- kilometre Arlberg Tunnel. Narrated by Bill Nighy

programme.title: Britain's Favourite 90s Songs
programme.desc: Revisiting the musical highs of 1993 in the company of Cliff Richard, Gabrielle, Shaun Ryder, Adamski, Jayne Middlemiss, Paul Gambaccini, Mark Radcliffe and others. It was the time Annie Lennox, Spin Doctors and 4 Non Blondes dominated the charts, but what was the biggest selling single of the year?

programme.title: Diana Ross: Secrets of Her Biggest Hits
programme.desc: As one of the most acclaimed vocalists of her generation, Diana Ross has attracted no end of fans. This documentary takes a closer look at the American singer and her work, from her earliest days to her global success as a solo star with hits such as Chain Reaction

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: A New Life in Oz
programme.desc: The Boundy family members decide to leave their Cornish home behind for Australia's South West, as mum Sasha wants to fulfil her dream of opening a sanctuary for animals in need. But as the family board their flight, they find out that their new house has fallen through, forcing them to stay with Sasha's brother

programme.title: Get Your Tatts Out: Kavos Ink
programme.desc: A woman lets a bunch of strangers design her elephant-themed tattoo, and another holiday-maker gets an image of his best mate inked on his leg

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: The life and work of Pieter Bruegel the Elder, generally considered the greatest Flemish painter of the 16th century, whose works remain among the most distinctive examples of Renaissance art, combining gritty humour with political comment. Tim Marlow reveals how Bruegel was influenced by the period of immense social change in which he lived

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Animation for younger viewers following the adventures of the cheeky piglet, her brother George and their friends

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Rebecca is worried that, unlike the other engines, there is nothing special about her. She is later impressed by Belle putting out a fire

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animated action adventure following a squad of six heroic puppies and their tech-savvy 10-year-old leader as they protect the community of Adventure Bay

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum

programme.title: In Harm's Way (1965)
programme.desc: Two Navy officers are disgraced in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, one for a disastrous engagement with the enemy and the other for a drunken brawl after learning of his wife's death. They get another chance to prove their worth when they are placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. Second World War drama, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas and Henry Fonda

programme.title: At Gunpoint (1955)
programme.desc: A peaceable shopkeeper becomes a local hero when he accidentally kills the leader of a gang of bank robbers. However, when the dead bandit's partners in crime come looking for retribution, he finds the friends and neighbours who praised his bravery are now about to abandon him. Western, starring Fred MacMurray, Dorothy Malone and Walter Brennan

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powell's mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girl's life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: 12 Years a Slave (2013)
programme.desc: A free black man living in pre-Civil War New York is abducted and sold into slavery. He spends the next 12 years struggling to survive and maintain his dignity in the face of brutal treatment, while clinging to a desperate hope that he can return to his family. Oscar-winning historical drama based on Solomon Northup's autobiographical book, starring Chiwetel Ejiofor, Michael Fassbender, Benedict Cumberbatch, Lupita Nyong'o and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Stratton (2017)
programme.desc: A British Special Boat Service commando tracks down an international terrorist cell. Thriller, starring Dominic Cooper, Austin Stowell and Gemma Chan

programme.title: The Counsellor (2013)
programme.desc: A lawyer who earns a living representing drug dealers makes a fateful decision to take an active role in their criminal activities. He quickly finds himself out of his depth in a criminal underworld he barely understands, where his actions bring deadly consequences. Ridley Scott's crime thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Penelope Cruz, Cameron Diaz, Javier Bardem and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Cowboy (1958)
programme.desc: A Chicago hotel clerk befriends a visiting cowboy and soon talks his way into joining him on a cattle drive so he can impress the woman he loves. The tenderfoot has no idea of what awaits him as he ventures out into the Wild West, an experience that forces him to undergo a dramatic change. Western, starring Jack Lemmon, Glenn Ford, Anna Kashfi and Brian Donlevy

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Shape of Water (2017)
programme.desc: Elisa Esposito is a mute singleton who lives above a cinema. Although friends with Giles, a neighbouring artist, she lives a lonely existence. While he has designs on the cafe worker nearby, Elisa cleans up at top-secret government lab, a bus ride away in Baltimore, Maryland. One day in 1962, she makes a life-changing discovery when Elisa finds an amphibious humanoid creature who is being held captive, and they embark on an extraordinary relationship. Guillermo del Toro's Oscar and Bafta-winning fantasy, starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Octavia Spencer and Doug Jones

programme.title: Picnic at Hanging Rock (1975)
programme.desc: Three schoolgirls and their teacher vanish during a trip to the Australian landmark on Valentine's Day, 1900. Peter Weir's atmospheric period mystery, starring Rachel Roberts, Dominic Guard, Helen Morse and Jacki Weaver

programme.title: Far North (2007)
programme.desc: A woman is driven from her homeland and forced to live an isolated existence with her adopted daughter in the Arctic wilderness. However, their endless solitude is broken when a wounded soldier appears one day from nowhere. The women take him back to their tent - but the newcomer sows seeds of discord, stirring up conflict between the two women. Drama, with Michelle Yeoh, Sean Bean and Michelle Krusiec

programme.title: Pimpernel Smith (1941)
programme.desc: An unassuming English professor working on an archaeological dig in Germany leads a double life helping enemies of the Nazi regime escape the country. Second World War adventure based on The Scarlet Pimpernel, directed by and starring Leslie Howard, with Francis L Sullivan, Mary Morris, Hugh McDermott, Raymond Huntley and Manning Whiley

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk (2008)
programme.desc: A bungled experiment causes a scientist to turn into a monster whenever he gets angry. He travels the world seeking a cure for his condition, while a ruthless general is determined to capture him and use the creature as a weapon. However, one of the soldiers under the officer's command undergoes a terrifying transformation of his own. Comic-book adventure, starring Edward Norton, Liv Tyler, Tim Roth and William Hurt

programme.title: American Animals (2018)
programme.desc: Spencer is a bored middle-class art student in Kentucky. He fills time gazing at the multi-million-dollar rare art book collection in the University library and decides that theft might give him the kicks he needs to feel special. Writer/director Bart Layton's crime thriller, starring Evan Peters, Barry Keoghan and Blake Jenner

programme.title: Ouija: Origin Of Evil (2016)
programme.desc: In 1967 Los Angeles, a widowed mother and her two daughters add a new stunt to boost their seance scam business. However, they get more than they bargained for when they invite an evil presence into their home. Supernatural horror prequel, starring Elizabeth Reaser and Annalise Basso

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley plans to break up with Fitch, but receives news that he is dead. She then meets Fitch's dad, Winston Douglas, who asks her to deliver the eulogy at the funeral, and he tells her Fitch planned to propose to her. Meanwhile, Ben realises he might be in love with Megan, but she thinks things are moving too quickly. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker's girlfriend Vanessa makes Ben's life miserable when she gets the assistant manager job at his bar, and tries to impose new hours and uniforms. However, he seizes an opportunity to get back at her by ruining a large event she is planning. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder pretends he is a college student so he can date one of Zander's room-mates, and Mel is less than pleased when Joe inherits a chair from his grandmother. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander avoid discussing their feelings for each other. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel thinks she might be pregnant, but is unsure how to tell Joe, who is in the middle of preparing for an important business pitch. Meanwhile, Ryder forms a study group with an eclectic mix of people, and Lennox and Zander get their wires crossed

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to find Pops a person to settle down with, and sets him up on a date with a woman called Sophia who seems to fit his demanding criteria. Meanwhile, Adam and Barry bond over their discovery of a new TV channel. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz and Santiago team up to take down a ruthless killer who has managed to elude them for seven years. Jeffords helps Peralta to tackle the chores on his wedding planning list. Captain Holt and his rival Olivia Crawford try to convince each other to step down from the campaign to become Police Commissioner

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad springs into action when Jake and Amy's wedding is jeopardised by a major threat. Holt is reluctant to open the email saying whether he has been appointed Commissioner

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date with a mystery man, so Sheldon asks Howard and Raj to help him find a new girlfriend online. When Amy is coy with the details about the guy she's dating, Penny and Bernadette decide to spy on them. Stephen Merchant guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Black-ish

programme.title: Black-ish

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta helps Santiago to navigate the complicated relationship that she has with her brother David. Boyle introduces some drama into an undercover mission involving Jeffords and Captain Holt

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A visitor from Latvia causes Boyle and Peralta to begin investigating Nikolaj's family. Captain Holt and Santiago bring in famed forensic scientist Dr Yee to help close a difficult murder case for Diaz

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette download a dating app onto Amy's phone in order to find her a new boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Diners include Sherry, a 65-year-old dominatrix looking for romance. She hopes chartered surveyor and t'ai chi enthusiast John might be the man for her. Meanwhile, Hannah, 40, is looking for a man who shares her love of adventure. Could 42-year-old Christmas tree farmer Rob be her Mr Right?

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The family gathers around the laptop to video chat with Ryder in New Orleans on his 18th birthday, but the computer crashes before they get the chance to talk. Joe insists that he can fix it, but Mel is convinced they need to employ an expert to repair it. Dani asks Lennox for advice on matters of the heart but doesn't follow her words of wisdom. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Scrubs

Meanwhile, the bride-to-be continues to prepare for her big day, but fails to persuade Dr Cox to attend. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Scrubs

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's feelings are hurt when Riley wants to talk to Danny and not him about her bar exam woes, but she finally tells him that she has taken the test three times without passing. Determined to support his friend, Ben tries to convince her not to give up on her dreams of becoming a lawyer. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben offers to dog-sit for his girlfriend Megan, but the animal does not seem to like him much. Elsewhere, Tucker is angered by his room-mates' messy habits, so Danny hires someone to clean the apartment. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox helps Ryder get creative on a job application. Meanwhile, Mel plans the perfect wedding for her friend Carrie (Vicki Davis), but when she suddenly calls off the big day, Mel debates whether she should keep the flowers, catering and venue for her and Joe. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe meet with their minister to discuss their relationship, and try to prove that everything between them is perfect. However, when they look back on their time together, they decide that honesty is not always the best way. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly confronts her husband after discovering her engagement ring is the same one Murray gave to his former fiancee. Assisted by Pops, Adam looks to a romantic comedy film for inspiration when trying to capture the attention of his attractive neighbour. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.desc: The guests head to the Mehfil Hotel in Southall, London, where spiritual host Arun and his sister Rashmi are hoping to bring some Indian hospitality to the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for one last time to find out what they have been paid. Debbie and Isobel are keen to get to the bottom of some of the cleaning comments from Steve and Verity

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers go to extreme lengths in their search for the relatives of a man from Ealing, west London. Plus, a case uncovers a connection to a serial killer arrested by the Metropolitan Police Service, and an American vaudeville performer who became a celebrity in London

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Giant otter couple Diego and Icana are the best of friends but have never mated, so keepers hope a new male will have what it takes to relight Icana's fire. Blue morpho butterflies Macuna and Peanut also need to mate, but when their diet of fruit ferments and turns to alcohol, their drunken behaviour might dash Chester's hopes of producing the next generation of butterflies. Cameras also follow the relationship between mum-and-daughter Andrean bears Lima and Madidi, who are fighting over food and personal space. Can the youngster learn to respect her elder?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca set to work renovating their kitchen, bBut with big dreams and a limited budget Rebecca visits Angel to see how far their money can stretch with a bit of creative know-how. Amy and Marc set themselves the unenviable task of transforming a bedroom with damaged floors, crumbling walls and a bathroom stuck in a '70s time-warp into a luxury B&B suite. Ben and Billie have it all to do as they aim to revamp an old outbuilding into a Moroccan oasis and illuminate the chateau with an architectural lighting display in preparation for Billie's brother's wedding

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Boat enthusiast James Strangeways invites Kevin McCloud to survey progress on the construction of his new home, which his architect nephew Ben Hebblethwaite has designed to be as 'un-houselike' as possible. James has spent the past 35 years travelling the canals and waterways of Britain, and despite never liking houses, has decided now is the time to put down roots on dry land. Ben hoped a home standing on stilts above a marsh in East Sussex, and incorporating ship-like qualities such as a keel-shaped roof, will be enough to satisfy his boat-mad uncle. However, Ben's contractor goes into liquidation a few months into the project, taking £87,000 of the £300,000 budget, and when James decides to make a few tweaks to the design, alarm-bells begin to ring for the young architect

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: Jenny's work and personal lives collide when she hosts a Thanksgiving dinner and the plumbing breaks down. Drama, starring Serinda Swan

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on a mother's role in different family units. Jacob, 20, arrives in resus with suspected internal bleeding after crashing his car into a wall at high speed, while Joan, 82, is treated for a head wound after tripping down the stairs at home, and seven-year-old Jackson has a suspected infection on his cheek. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff dealing with the emergencies

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and David Mitchell compete against Jon Richardson and Katherine Ryan. The Brett Domino Trio join Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: Jenny's work and personal lives collide when she hosts a Thanksgiving dinner and the plumbing breaks down. Drama, starring Serinda Swan

programme.title: Secret Bridesmaids' Business
programme.desc: The friends celebrate Olivia's hen's night, unaware that Jakob has been released and is coming after them. When the wedding day dawns, Saskia tries to put on a happy face for the celebrations but hides a gun in her handbag, while Melanie agonises over a new secret that will change her entire world - she's pregnant. Moments before the ceremony, desperate Jakob closes in, using Daisy to draw Melanie into a climactic, life-and-death confrontation

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on a mother's role in different family units. Jacob, 20, arrives in resus with suspected internal bleeding after crashing his car into a wall at high speed, while Joan, 82, is treated for a head wound after tripping down the stairs at home, and seven-year-old Jackson has a suspected infection on his cheek. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff dealing with the emergencies

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty looks into skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product that claims to be entirely fat-free, but has a surprisingly creamy texture, and Kate Quilton heads to one of the busiest oyster hatcheries in France, where she witnesses the amazing science that goes into providing oysters year-round. Matt Tebbutt wants to know if the dried strawberries in his cereal are real or just a clever imitation

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jannine and Shaun Cartwright build treasure chests for their young boys' toys with help from furniture-maker Anselm Fraser

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Robert Pemberton and Carole Wheatley have recently retired and are looking for a winter home where they can embrace their passion for gardening and spend time with their children and grandchildren. Ben Hillman shows them five properties in the lush north of Tenerife for their £120,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The researchers investigate the case of a famous Blackpool accordion player, and reveal a tragic tale of separation involving two brothers who died on the same day in the same hospital after not seeing each other for many years. Plus, the team explores the history of Rolls-Royce and the Crewe railways, before sharing details of other unclaimed estates

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: As the summer comes to an end, the programme checks in with the ex-pats chasing dream lives in the sun. It's harvest day for the new winemakers in France, a disease threatens the future of a fishing business, and a revamp seeks to save Spain's newest tapas bar

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Farmer's daughter Mandy Sowray and her friend Anny Harrison host first at Laskill Country House in Helmsley, North Yorkshire. Chris Witton and Saroop Ram from the Swan Hotel feel right at home, but tech-savvy Colin and Ben Warburg from Scalford Hall Hotel fail to connect from the start. During the afternoon's hay-bale race, youngsters Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker from the Abbey Hotel fail to stack up to the challenge. At dinner, Mandy bigs up her banger qualifications, but at breakfast she fails to crack Chris's order. Colin's feedback leaves unanswered questions for Mandy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Witton and his spiritual friend Rammy hope that straightforward value for money will win them the competition, as they host at the Swan Hotel in Telford. A Yorkshire pudding-making competition leaves confident cooks Mandy and Anny thinking there's more to youngsters Charlie and Lauren than meets the eye. At dinner, Rammy opens up about his troubled past. Colin has a rude awakening in the morning. At feedback time, Chris has a change of heart about some of his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Colin Warburg and his student son Ben hope that their 81-room country pile - Scalford Hall Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire - will wow their rivals. However, Chris and Rammy are still smarting from their feedback and think that Colin is playing games. After an afternoon crate stacking competition on the hotel's high wire course, Colin gets a grilling at dinner. A lukewarm reaction to breakfast only adds to Colin's woes and when he sees his feedback he suspects that retribution is at hand

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Abbey Hotel in Battle, East Sussex, run by confident young colleagues Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker. However when Charlie and Lauren's guests arrive, Colin and Ben feel the squeeze and Chris and Rammy find themselves in a sticky situation. On an afternoon at the archery range, scores are settled. At dinner, straight-talking Chris can't help but be impressed, but when the conversation turns to parking, the guests are in a jam with their hosts. Later, Colin's feedback leaves Lauren wanting answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to settle some scores. Laskill Country House host Mandy wants to crack where she went wrong with breakfast and why Colin and Ben failed to connect with her, while Chris and Rammy from The Swan Hotel wish to question Lauren on her room flaws and get to the bottom of Colin's bedroom nightmares

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The search for beneficiaries in two cases reveals the tale of Second World War desert soldiers, who did battle with more than just enemy fire, and the excitement of early film societies and amateur movie-makers. Later, details of unclaimed estates are disclosed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Flamingo chick Marley faces a tough childhood when mother Calypso loses interest in her duties - leaving dad Rum to do the work of two parents. The keepers are concerned when a newborn onager foal takes a turn for the worse, and a Sulawesi macaque monkey Rumple gives birth to a baby called Rey, only for the baby to get bullied by some of the higher-ranking females

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: It's breaking point for Tim and Rebecca as they struggle to complete their kitchen as an expensive mishap with granite worktops put Rebecca's dream room in jeopardy. Meanwhile, at Ben and Billie's chateau, the duo welcome 60 guests for the wedding of Billie's brother Pete

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: After recovering from a life-threatening brain haemorrhage, Bram Vis, along with his wife Lisa, sets out to build a house for them and their two children on a seaside plot on the Isle of Wight. Kevin McCloud follows the family's progress as they build an ambitious home complete with entertaining spaces and a swimming pool. However, the sheer scale of their project soon becomes clear when their original £850,000 budget spirals out of control

programme.title: Ice Cold Murders: Rocco Schiavone
programme.desc: After the incident, Rocco is questioned by his bosses. Depressed, upset and plunged back into reliving the unhappy events of the past, he is unable to return to his everyday job. But his depression lifts when he joins forces with close companions in a quest for revenge. Crime thriller, starring Marco Giallini. In Italian

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Samuel, 24, is rushed to A&E after crashing his motorbike and being thrown into the road, while two-year-old Florence is brought in by her mum and dad, who suspect that she has swallowed a coin. Seventy-year-old Clive arrives after struggling to breathe at home, but his wife Linda has a difficult time keeping him in check, as he likes to tell a joke or two. Documentary following life inside the A&E department of St George's in south-west London, focusing on patients, their families and the staff

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Twenty-five-year-old Billy arrives at St George's by helicopter after being involved in a motorcycle accident in which a van ran over his chest. The team work quickly to get him into CT to see if he has any life-changing injuries, while his girlfriend, mum and stepdad desperately try to get to the hospital. Meanwhile, 58-year-old Stephen comes into A&E with his wife and son after showing signs of a stroke, and Milly brings her two-year-old son Freddie in after he jammed his thumb in a door

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall and Checkpoint Charlie now teems with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations, such as pureed sunflower seeds, Jerusalem artichoke flans and crushed frozen pine nuts. Loved by the likes of Greta Garbo, Charlie Chaplin and Auguste Escoffier there's still a cornucopia of choice for those with a more traditional temperament with eisbein, meatballs and sausages topping every menu in the German capital

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Which team will rise to the occasion?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner: 10 Years and a Lovely Bit of Squirrel
programme.desc: A celebration of Robert Popper's comedy Friday Night Dinner, to mark its 10-year anniversary. The sitcom, which coined the catchphrase 'lovely bit of squirrel', centred on the fortunes of the eccentric Goodman family and their even more surreal neighbour Jim. With behind-the-scenes material and never-before-seen outtakes, this documentary features interviews with stars including Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Mark Heap and Tracy-Ann Oberman. It also includes the thoughts of celebrity fans Claudia Winkleman, Joe Thomas, David Baddiel and Jessica Hynes

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Martin McDonagh's Bafta and Oscar-winning crime drama, starring Frances McDormand, Sam Rockwell and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, some of Britain's best loved personalities, turn their hand to being the country's most opinionated viewers, sharing their opinions on what they have been watching during the week

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: After two gruelling years during which Johnny Vegas has seen his plans for his glampsite hit by every problem imaginable, he is finally ready for the grand unveiling. Unfortunately, it's in front of his harshest critics - his family and friends. With the final vehicles arriving, there's time for Johnny to deceive his assistant Bev one more time, before he presents her with the 1950s camper van he bought and restored as a gift. As last-minute preparations on the site continue, Johnny inspects the renovated fire truck which quickly takes a wrong turn as he manages to get stuck on the roof, and things get worse from there. As he and Bev prepare for the arrival of the much-loved Maltese bus that started the whole adventure, disaster strikes one final time

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A look back at the times that the unique dating show has broken new ground, featuring stories from across the spectrum of gender and sexuality. There is also a catch-up with Lauren Harries, celebrated transsexual woman and the first celebrity to appear in a pod, and Josh, who was on the third series, to find out if he is still a virgin

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness
programme.desc: Andy, Kiran, Mandi and Mollie fight it out for a shot at the jackpot, facing tricky questions on anything from crisp flavours to Nigel Havers. Contestants' general knowledge is put to the test as they play for the chance to win £25,000. However, the more answers the quizzers know, the dafter they must look to prove it

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles present as the pastry chefs are challenged to make a cube-shaped dessert, with sharp edges from every angle, and magical confections that look exactly like mushrooms but taste anything but - all in just three and a half hours. And that's just their first task. For their second, judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden ask them to create a heroes and villains-themed showpiece adorned with 160 macarons. Which team will rise to the occasion?

programme.title: We Are Lady Parts
programme.desc: Amina settles into life in the band, while desperately trying to keep it a secret from her best friend Noor and her university friends, who would not approve. But when Lady Parts' big audition falls on the same day as Noor's engagement party, the strain of living a double life starts to take its toll on Amina

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
