programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Luxury-loving Hattie is less than ecstatic to be heading off on a wild adventure holiday with Bear Grylls enthusiast Pete, his partner Louise and their two girls

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Artists David and Carol, who have been left with a shortfall in their UK pension after living abroad for years, try to sell some of their work at a market in Fuengirola. Campsite dweller and DJ Noel - who has a 10-year plan to buy a bar - gears up to spin tunes at his biggest gig of the year, the National San Juan festival. Cameras also follow former Playboy bunny Michelle and her husband Tony, who have taken advantage of the Costa's roasting heat and bought an awning company

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The staff step back in time when they venture down into tunnels under the station to carry out fire safety checks, and it is the start of a bank holiday getaway for thousands of commuters. Jennie, Great Western Railway's new customer ambassador, manages to seat a troupe of young cheerleaders all together, but faces a much bigger challenge when fire alarms go off during rush hour

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Internet entrepreneur Martin and his partner in grime Glenn hear about a huge fly-tipping operation blighting a remote Hampshire beauty spot, and raise a small army of volunteers who roll up their sleeves to sort it themselves. Meanwhile, the UK's network of motorways and A-roads rely upon a system of lay-bys to help keep drivers safe, but these safe pull-in zones also attract an unsightly collection of filthy behaviour, and it falls to Huntingdon lay-by warriors Clive and Steve to take on the speeding traffic, atrocious weather, drunk drivers - and those people who confuse lay-bys with lavatories

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The police deal with a suicidal young man with mental health problems, an Eritrean woman dumped out of a lorry by people traffickers, and a local lass who has quarrelled with her two-timing boyfriend. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: This episode focuses on car thieves, with the hunt for a stolen Ford Fiesta in Leeds ending in a dramatic foot chase as officers pursue one of the mouthiest criminals they have ever encountered. On the other side of the city, two men steal two high-performance cars before leading the cops on one of the longest pursuits in the history of the force as they criss-cross the county for more than an hour, frequently at speeds in excess of 150mph

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A speeding car crashes, leaving a passenger trapped inside while the driver flees on foot, and a drunken man kicks his partner out of the car and onto the hard shoulder before driving off with their children. Duncan and his trusty hound catch a burglar red-handed, and a man sleeping off a night of heavy drinking in his car gets a rude awakening

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A driver reverses his car into Bob's pursuing police vehicle three times before speeding down an off-road track, while handler Duncan and his trusty dog Tia are called in to search a house with an alarm that has been going off all night

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A car thief in Wakefield rams his way out of a petrol station before leading Jaffa, Chris and the rest of the team on a high-speed and highly dangerous pursuit. Big H and Stef can't believe their luck when two drug dealers park up right in front their unmarked car, while Wayne and Tom face some fighting talk from a 17-year-old, and a late-night collision with a Mini highlights the risks officers face on the road

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall arrives in Leeds, where English bulldog Wilson's destructive behaviour is making his owner so distraught that she is considering having him rehomed. Realising that this bolshie bulldog's behaviour is all for attention, Graeme sets about turning it around and to restore harmony to the home. Later, in Northampton, Graeme encounters Pomeranians Bella and Lola, who are attacking anything coming through the door

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned fights dangerous feelings for Sheila C after their moment of intimacy, and Toadie considers taking a romantic leap of faith with Mel

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac loses her cool after Ryder arrives at Salt to ask for his job back. Chloe and Ryder try to plan their future. Jasmine's horrific tarot reading experience haunts her

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall's casebook starts with a broken bond between two best friends. Cairn terrier Ted has turned on his owner Mike after having a stroke and now Mike can't even cross his front room without Ted attacking him. Can Graeme help them pave the way back to friendship? There's a little girl's best friend, who is perfect at home, but a nightmare in the neighbourhood, leaving mum Jess so stressed out with his bad behaviour that if things don't change, she wants to rehome him

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: At Tencreek holiday park in Looe, Cornwall, new Yellow Coats Charley and Andi make their debuts as park mascots Deano and Sparky, while trouble in the toilet block puts park manager Rob in the firing line from an irate customer. Over in Somerset, Holiday Resort Unity's head of catering Sharon has to turn around the park's new burger joint in record time

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Extreme cleaners Richard and Brennan head to Oxfordshire, where they come to the aid of a couple whose cluttered home is putting strain on their marriage. Sarah and Andy live in a four-bedroom detached house with their two children, four cats and one dog, but Andy is a hoarder who struggles to get rid of old family possessions that he just doesn't need, and Sarah is a spender, a shopaholic who buys clothes and jewellery for a fashion business that's yet to get off the ground

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house

programme.title: The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex
programme.desc: The team heads to Derbyshire where young couple Abi, an emergency dispatcher and children's football coach Dale have lost the spark in their relationship

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Patrick Mackay, who confessed to murdering 11 people in London and Kent in the mid-1970s. His victims included a Catholic priest, bludgeoned to death with an axe

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Return of the documentary in which two families with different incomes exchange holidays to see if money can buy happiness. Just who really has the time of their lives when faced with windy campsites and basic bedrooms in Benidorm or luxury foreign villas and private yachts? And does the top 10 per cent ever want to share their loungers with the bottom 10 per cent?

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Charlie grew up in the luxury of his parents' 16-acre home, but now he is going on his first budget British break with camping experts the Mason family

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: A crown green bowling team in Saydo is determined to end a losing streak, while Joe and Jan receive some devastating news concerning the future of the dog shelter. A Peterborough man who relocated to the Costa Del Sol launches his mobile cocktail bar, and a former racehorse that has been repeatedly rehomed and returned to the rescue centre may finally have found the right owner

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A broken down train causes major disruption during the morning rush hour and the locomotive of the famous Riviera sleeper train is pressed into service to shift it. Staff have to deal with a series of medical emergencies at the station, including a fall on an escalator, an epileptic seizure and a suspected cardiac arrest

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: In Northumbria, a specialist sewage blockage team tackle a series of weather-induced problems, including a manhole spouting wet wipes, a drain blocked by plastic bottles and a poo 'sausage' threatening to send raw sewage back into people's homes. Meanwhile, in Worcestershire, the food inspectors are out in force, conducting a second round of surprise visits on two restaurants that did not quite make the mark last time. With more than 500 deaths a year from food poisoning and more than 7,000 food establishments failing basic hygiene standards annually, the two eateries have their work cut out to satisfy the inspectors

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents an edition featuring the dangerous, sometimes bizarre and always risky consequences of combining cars with night-time drinking. In Huddersfield, four police vehicles are needed to stop a car that has failed to halt despite having a motorbike hanging precariously out of its boot, while officers chase a 4x4 from Bradford city centre to the countryside

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers deal with a four-car collision outside a primary school. They make sure all those injured or hurt are accounted for, and also set about finding out who was to blame. A speeding driver is desperate to escape from police and smashes into traffic at a junction, causing carnage before escaping on foot. He has left his passengers behind, but will they help the cops or hinder the course of the investigation? Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue an out-of-control car that hurtles wildly over a major junction and crashes between two trees. When it stops, the driver and passenger, who are miraculously unharmed, turn out to be 12. Police officers in West Yorkshire investigate a rise in cloned cars, a drunken driver has a tall story to tell, and an armed response vehicle pursues a speeding car across Huddersfield

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jaffa is on the case when he spots a new car speeding through town without its lights on, while Dave and Warren take the helm in an operation to curb lorry thefts

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Essex-based high-speed police interception unit pursues a gang of would-be jewellery thieves, while a burglar leads the team on a car chase

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall calms down a Great Dane with a not-so-great attitude and gives scared Labrador Buckley some reassurance, while two pugs put up a fight

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Susan struggles to accept an unsettling truth, Toadie finds himself in a compromising position, and Harlow works hard to forgive Paul, not knowing how little he deserves it

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tane's true feelings come to light after a drunk Mac propositions him. Amber cannot deny her insecurities regarding Dean and Ziggy

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits by the Sea
programme.desc: Darren lands a trial run as manager of a new drag bar in Blackpool, but to make his job permanent he needs to hit the Saturday night target of £4,000 in sales. In Skegness, brothers Taj and TK are on a mission to revolutionise the local bar scene and challenge marketing manager Matt to come up with a plan to drive daytime business

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: There are complications when a woman who suffers from kidney failure is admitted with a heart condition, and two builders are rushed into casualty after a roof collapsed under them. Meanwhile, 65-year-old Alan goes for a CT scan after an epileptic fit left him with a serious head wound, and doctors treat a 12-year-old boy who has been attacked by a dog

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with multiple stab wounds to his abdomen and after the team check whether his organs have been affected, he is rushed in for emergency surgery. Meanwhile, a teenage footballer arrives by helicopter, having lost all sensation below the waist after an accident during a game, and a dairy farmer is wheeled into A&E, having being knocked unconscious by a cow's hoof. Worried about a bleed on the brain, staff fast-track him to CT, aware that any trauma to the brain could affect his ability to do his very physical job

programme.title: Critical Surgery: Changing Lives
programme.desc: The second of two documentaries about the work of volunteer medics performing reconstructive facial surgery in Ethiopia. Twenty-year-old Hulu Sintayehu, from the poorest region of Addis Ababa in Ethiopia, has a tumour growing into the side of her neck, deep into her blood vessels. The surgeons from Facing Africa have not seen this type of tumour before, presenting them with a highly complicated operation - and if they run out of anything, they have no spares, so they have to think on their feet and come up with a plan B

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Dr Ben Taylor and critical care paramedic Aiden Brown work with the fire and ambulance services to rescue an 11-year-old boy trapped in the wreckage of a car he was a passenger in. After a nasty tackle on the rugby pitch, 40- year-old Dave is left with a horrific break to his foot and critical care paramedic Pete Edwards must manually realign the bones as quickly as possible, but it's an excruciating procedure

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Return of the documentary looking at how people buy, sell and market sex, hearing from an array of individuals working within Britain's multimillion-pound industry. In the first edition, aficionados and retailers reveal why they believe sex dolls are set to revolutionise the nation's lives

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: A millionaire whose obsessions shifted from spending a fortune on sex workers, tanks and guns to a controlling relationship with a woman involving blackmail and revenge

programme.title: Dirty John
programme.desc: Debra discovers John's criminal record, but even hard evidence about his past of abuse, stalking and scamming is not enough to convince her of his true intentions

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New Saydo Park arrivals Carole and Phyllis already love life in Spain but they want to experience more of the community spirit, so they sign up for fellow resident Margaret's mystery tour. Where will it take them? Tree surgeon Rocky faces danger on a daily basis as he tends to the high branches of the Costa del Sol, while young magician Dean faces the first night of a residency at the Chamber of Secrets theatre

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A track circuit failure has been detected at Platform 5 and instructions from the signalling centre are to close it, putting the pressure on the Track Response team to fix the problem. British Transport Police are out in force as crowds of football fans pass through Paddington, while in the control room, Graeme is shocked to witness a young man walking dangerously close to the edge of a platform

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: After a payday weekend of drunken carnage in Bristol, it falls to colleagues Alan and Paul to mop up the six tonnes of kebab boxes, broken bottles, vomit and other unspeakable substances left behind in its wake. Meanwhile, waste enforcement officers in Essex are out to catch the litter louts behind the UK's most commonly dropped item of rubbish - the cigarette butt

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: North Yorkshire officers are called out to a massive crash near a theme park that has resulted in the death of at least one person. The need to understand what has happened and who - if anyone - is to blame tests the resources of all the traffic cops who attend and then investigate this fatal incident. Will their gut instincts that this is a drug-fuelled disaster prove correct?

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents an edition focusing on the hunt for disqualified, unlicensed and uninsured drivers. In Bradford, officers from the West Yorkshire Safer Roads team pursue a desperate and disqualified driver through the city streets, while a member of the public is forced into making a citizen's arrest when another banned motorist attempts to flee the scene of a crash. In York, a pensioner is knocked down in a hit-and-run incident and an urgent search for the culprit gets under way

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Air Support Unit's helicopter is called into action late at night to look for an armed robber. On the ground, police pursue an escaped prisoner driving a stolen car down the wrong side of a dual carriageway and a van being driven erratically through the streets of Essex

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A police chase ends with the driver of a stolen Lexus crashing the luxury motor, and the police interception unit deals with an Essex girl whose car is 'too sexy' for the law. Elsewhere, a high-speed pursuit results in a head-on collision with one of the team's vehicles

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team discovers the garage hideout of a gang of burglars in a country lane, and pursues a BMW driver who endangers his life by running across four lanes of a dual carriageway to escape with a suspicious package. The police interceptors also apprehend a mother driving with no tax, insurance or MOT, who turns out never to have passed her driving test

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly

Sarah and Andy live in a four-bedroom detached house with their two children, four cats and one dog, but Andy is a hoarder who struggles to get rid of old family possessions that he just doesn't need, and Sarah is a spender, a shopaholic who buys clothes and jewellery for a fashion business that's yet to get off the ground

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Two struggling musicians from Bexley take a cruise on Croatia's Adriatic coast, where they hope to put some spark back in their relationship, while wealthy best friends from Surrey Quays go on a caravan holiday in Shropshire, volunteering on a local farm in exchange for free board and lodging and getting to grips with compost loos and basic caravans

programme.title: Geostorm (2017)
programme.desc: After an unprecedented series of natural disasters threaten the future of the planet, an intricate network of satellites is created to control the global climate and keep everyone safe. However, when those satellites start to attack the Earth, it's a race against time for its creator to uncover the real threat before a worldwide storm wipes out everything and everyone. Sci-fi thriller, starring Gerard Butler, Jim Sturgess and Abbie Cornish

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: One of Jessica's students is wrongly arrested for murder, prompting her to set out to find the real killer and clear the innocent man's name. Guest starring Robert Beltran

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects a desperate US Marine may have faked his own death with the help of a friend and blown up an ambulance in a botched attempt to cover all traces of the subterfuge. Subsequent developments, including a mysterious disappearance, seem to confirm the hypothesis - until a timely discovery by Abby throws new light on the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to a national forest where several women have gone missing and conclude there may be a serial killer at large - a theory confirmed in gruesome fashion as the investigation proceeds. Drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. Briscoe and Green attempt to discover whether either of them took the law into his own hands. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A witness to a jewellery store robbery that went tragically wrong fails to appear in court. McCoy suspects foul play - until it transpires the man has been on the run for the past 20 years. Police drama, guest starring Mandy Patinkin of Criminal Minds fame, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Although the shootings appear random, Briscoe and Green suspect the deaths are linked and discover a connection between one of the victims and a former marine who is an expert shot with the rifle used in the crimes. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. They then have to look into the abduction of an expectant mother. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is assigned to examine the apparent suicide of a Pentagon cryptographer suspected of spying. The case is thrown into disarray by the discovery of evidence indicating another person was present at the time of death - meaning the real mole may still be on the loose and has already killed at least once. Crime drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: Rules of Engagement (2000)
programme.desc: An embittered lawyer reluctantly defends a former Vietnam comrade-in-arms who has been court-martialled for opening fire on innocent civilians during a siege on the US embassy in Yemen. Courtroom drama, starring Tommy Lee Jones, Samuel L Jackson, Guy Pearce, Ben Kingsley, Philip Baker Hall, Anne Archer and Bruce Greenwood

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A pregnant Muslim student is murdered, and initial inquiries suggest the crime was prompted by her efforts to break up a clash between two ethnic groups. However, Logan and Wheeler later learn the victim was secretly dating an Italian-American against the wishes of her parents, who had organised an arranged marriage - and as they investigate the animosity between the two families, more blood is shed

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An officer's teenage stepdaughter is found dead in her car after a night of partying, leading Goren and Eames to investigate her boss - who is also an ex-boyfriend - and his supermodel wife. However, when another supposed lover comes forward, their attention turns to a different source and they must combat a small-town police force trying to protect one of its own. Guest starring Brooke Shields

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler are forced to explain their actions after the stabbing of a fireman leads to a massive brawl and an official inquiry. When questions arise concerning the victim's sexual preference, the detectives link the crime to a similar murder 12 years earlier - but a secret the wife has been keeping could hold the key to solving the case. Drama, starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a marine's wife is shown live on the internet and inquiries point to two housewives who were running their own pornographic website, but have since vanished. The search for the missing pair begins with the webster administrator - and ends with a surprising discovery

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is embroiled in a grand-scale conspiracy when she investigates the murder of private detective Bernie Callan, whose body was found 30 years after his death in 1963. Joining forces with the dead man's daughter, she discovers the late gumshoe's demise is linked to another high-profile murder from that year - that of US president John F Kennedy. Angela Lansbury stars as the ambitious amateur sleuth

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is assigned to examine the apparent suicide of a Pentagon cryptographer suspected of spying. The case is thrown into disarray by the discovery of evidence indicating another person was present at the time of death - meaning the real mole may still be on the loose and has already killed at least once. Crime drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a luxury sports car dealer and identify a link between the victim's last customer and a recent spate of robberies. However, the discovery that their prime suspect has learning difficulties soon leads the team to his manipulative girlfriend. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: New York's district attorneys investigate the mysterious death of a stockbroker who was dating the daughter of a ruthless cosmetics mogul - and find themselves caught up in a wrangle over whether HRT withdrawal can be used as a defence in law. Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to trap a crooked lawyer who bribes his clients - but as he tries to track down the man's accomplice, he realises the investigation has placed his own job on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green question a comedian in connection with the death of his adopted child, and uncover allegations that he molested an 11-year-old boy years previously. Reopening the case, they investigate a tangled tale of greed, deceit and broken trust involving the alleged victim's parents. Starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charity worker with a secret appetite for sordid encounters dies at the hands of a serial killer, but the defendant constructs a unique case by claiming the crime was the result of exposure to excessive violence on television. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect dies while being restrained by Ziva, who finds herself accused of using undue force and becomes the subject of an internal investigation. To make matters worse, Jenny is kidnapped by the dead man's brother, who demands a consignment of impounded heroin in exchange for her release. Drama, guest starring Connor Trinneer (Enterprise) and Tamara Taylor (Bones), with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes the target of an assassination attempt while working in the lab - and the team's search for her would-be killer leads to the main suspect in an embezzlement trial at which she is appearing as a witness. However, subsequent developments also place her ex-boyfriend in the frame. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs is injured in an explosion while conducting inquiries aboard a ship. He lapses into a coma, during which he has flashbacks of the past he has always kept hidden. Meanwhile, Tony takes over the investigation, but his approach begins to cause friction

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former detective asks the SVU for help when he suspects his two young daughters are being groomed by the influential predatory owner of a modeling agency for teenage girls, and his equally predatory female assistant. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Ice T

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A woman and her date are murdered in her apartment while enjoying a romantic evening in. Though Goren and Eames initially suspect the married father of her 18-month-old daughter, they soon begin to believe that members of her rich family were involved in the crime - and may have killed before. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star, with Doris Roberts and Richard Kind

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A candidate for the next New York mayoral elections finds her campaign in jeopardy when Goren and Eames investigate her husband on suspicion of hiring a hitman to kill a judge. However, evidence resulting from a tip-off and the discovery of a second body may be a little too neat - and instead indicate a conspiracy. Xander Berkeley guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the poisoning of a well-known historian, pursuing a line of inquiry that leads to the victim's cash-strapped brother. Unfortunately, he too is later found murdered, and the detectives turn their attention to the two men's wives - only to discover that both stood to gain from being widowed. Drama, guest starring Rip Torn

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames travel to Vietnam to pick up a man who has recently confessed to murdering a 10-year-old actor in 1992. However, it is not long before the detectives find holes in his story, and begin to reassess the original investigation - leading them to believe the suspect may be much closer to home than anyone thought. Guest starring Liza Minnelli

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team raids an illegal motor business run by US navy officers and find a marine's severed head in the boot of a car. Tony succeeds in tracking down the owner of the stolen vehicle with the help of McGee's hacking skills, while Abby tries to discover the identity of the dead man. Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. Guest starring Gregory Hines, in his final acting role before his death

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An answering machine message leads Briscoe and Curtis to reopen an investigation into an arson attack that killed a girl - but the 15-year-old suspect has a powerful ally in his grandfather, an influential force in political spheres. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green embark on their first official case together, investigating the kidnapping of a mother and daughter which occurred during a city-wide blackout. When it appears the abductor knew about the power cut in advance, the possibility of the manipulation of energy is called into question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant security guard is injured when a package explodes at a scientific research lab, prompting Green and Lupo to investigate a chemist's latest experiments. It transpires that research is being undertaken to establish whether it is possible to isolate the 'gay gene' in unborn foetuses. Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a male nurse is found beaten to within an inch of his life - but as they draw closer to their prime suspects, the shocking motives for the attack become clear. Gritty police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs emerges from his coma, but is suffering from amnesia - hindering the team's attempts to unravel a terrorist plot, as he is the only person likely to possess information on the would-be perpetrator's plans. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and the team try to prove Ziva had nothing to do with a political assassination carried out by her former Mossad partner - but have to tackle the case without Gibbs, who has retired to Mexico and now spends his time building boats. Naval crime drama, starring Cote de Pablo and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Against his better judgement, Gibbs comes out of retirement to help Fornell and his daughter, whose lives are being threatened by an escaped convict. The team reopens the criminal's case and questions a former sailor, the only person to have contacted him while he was in jail. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette, with Hal Holbrook

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. Supernatural drama, based on a novel by Stephen King, starring Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

Fact-based action adventure, starring Richard Todd, William Hartnell and Akim Tamiroff

programme.desc: In the bombed-out ruins of the Belgian town of Ypres in 1916, Captain Fred Roberts and Lieutenant Jack Pearson discover a printing press and decide to start a satirical newspaper to raise the spirits of the British troops. It proves hugely popular with the men in the trenches - but their superior officers see it as an act of insubordination and subversion and call for a ban. Feature-length factual drama by Ian Hislop and Nick Newman, starring Ben Chaplin, Julian Rhind-Tutt, Michael Palin and Emilia Fox

programme.title: Pointless
